summary: CryptoRadar v1.1 testing completed - Successfully validated upgrade from mock data to real Kraken and CryptoCompare APIs. All critical features working including WebSocket real-time updates.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor timeout when clicking body to close dropdown - overlay interception

passed_tests: All 36 backend API endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Market Status API returns real Kraken data with proper data_source field
Chart Candles API returns real OHLC data from Kraken
Order Book API returns real bid/ask walls from Kraken
News API returns real crypto news from CryptoCompare with sentiment analysis
Market Bias includes real orderbook imbalance in calculation (34.3% observed)
Support/Resistance includes 7 orderbook-based levels
Liquidity uses real orderbook data with 'Kraken OrderBook' source
Whale Alerts detect real volume spikes from Kraken data
WebSocket /api/ws/price streams real-time price updates (confirmed price changes from $69,986.80 to $70,000.80)
Dashboard displays live BTC price with proper formatting ($69,951.50 observed)
Dashboard shows 'via Kraken' data source indicator
Order Book card shows real bid/ask walls with live updates
News page displays 8 real crypto news articles with sentiment tags
All UI navigation working (Dashboard, News, Order Book sections)
Real-time market bias updates (NEUTRAL 50.0% confidence observed)
Real-time orderbook imbalance display (-4.78% observed)
Support/Resistance levels updating with real data
Liquidity direction showing real analysis (BALANCED observed)
Whale alerts displaying real signals (LONG alert with 68.6% confidence)
